Referential equality between noun phrases in question and context.
Predicates that entail sentences in the context
Who captained Richmond's first ever woman's team?

The 2018 season marked the first year the Richmond Football Club ran a women's team and the first year in the VFL Women's competition (VFLW). Former men's VFL assistant coach Tom Hunter was named the team's head coach in November 2017. Jess Kennedy was named the team's inaugural captain in May 2018.
